titular: Projects under DSOP Achieve 95% Budget Execution in PIDDA
cuerpo:
In the PIDDA report, it is indicated that from the projects listed in this plan, the Junta DSOP conducted a total of 84 public tenders last year. By the end of the year, at least 95% of the budget allocated to these projects has been executed.

This achievement demonstrates successful planning and coordination of DSOP projects within the PIDDA framework.
